ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: Chapter V.—The vain pretensions of false gods.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
verses.text: But concerning those who think that they shall share the holy and perfect name, which some have received by a vain tradition as if they were gods, Menander in the Auriga says:—

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
verses.text: The same Menander, in the Sacerdos, says:—

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
verses.text: Again, the same Menander, stating his opinion about those who are received as gods, proving rather that they are not so, says:—

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
verses.text: And Euripides the tragedian, in Orestes, says:—

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
verses.text: The same also in the Piscatores:—

verses.book: On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
On the Sole Government of God
